allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img=Image.open\('d:/flutterProjects/my_first_flutter_app/assets/ratingbg/UI_CMN_DXRating_01.png'\); w,h=img.size; print\(f'{w}x{h}'\); pixels=img.load\(\); dark=[\(x,y\) for y in range\(h\) for x in range\(w\) if pixels[x,y][0]<30 and pixels[x,y][1]<30 and pixels[x,y][2]<30 and pixels[x,y][3]>200]; xs=[p[0] for p in dark]; ys=[p[1] for p in dark]; print\(f'dark box: \({min\(xs\)},{min\(ys\)}\)-\({max\(xs\)},{max\(ys\)}\) size {max\(xs\)-min\(xs\)}x{max\(ys\)-min\(ys\)}'\)")
